transcript: A truck brakes failed. The driver frantically horned to signal. At that moment, an old grandmother was about to cross the road. Seeing the rushing truck, she instantly frowns in place and did not know what to do. At that moment Tony rushed out and pushed the grandmother away. What was unexpected was that the truck was blocked by Tony's body. He himself was also stunned. The crowd around have praised Tony, but Tony's eyes looked to the other side. Then he climbed the high wall without saying a word and even danced in the street on it. He talked to his grandfather about the encounter in the past few days, proudly said he had superpowers. Unexpectedly, grandfather suddenly stabbed him. Sure enough, the knife was deformed, but Tony was unharmed. Grandpa urged Tony to use his powers to gain money and status, but Tony just wanted to be himself. He came outside and looked at the ring his father left behind and instantly thought of the words his father said when he left.
